title: CFD-1D thermal parity roadmap
scope: Capture the agreed roadmap for matching CFD and 1D thermal boundary/source contracts before developing predictive internal thermal-development closures.
decisions_recorded: Patch-level CFD boundary documentation is the target; segment-averaged reductions must be explicitly documented.
Realized wallHeatFlux is for diagnosis; imposed boundary inputs are for setup documentation.
rcExternalTemperature emissivity/Tsur usage must be audited before deciding 1D radiation parity.
Matching priority is total heat balance, branch heat loss, station/probe temperatures, then wall temperatures.
Diagnostic parity mode comes before predictive internal HTC/development model.
Predictive work should favor developing-profile and wall-adjacent-temperature models where feasible, with effective HTC as fallback.
